Posted at 9:02

Okay y'all, I'm gonna try and gentle parent some of you guys.

Gentle, gentle reminder that this is indeed my profile—meaning, I can post what I want (as long as it abides by TOS, of course).

When I post a certain POV, it's because I want that POV. If I use certain dialogue or writing styles, it's becomes I want to. I've made it pretty clear from the beginning that my bots are self-indulgent! I only makes bots I would enjoy.

The same also applies to suggestions, I've made it clear that I don't do requests, and I don't do every suggestion, I only make bots with prompts that I like.

This isn't directed at anyone specific so stop worrying, but please keep in mind that this is my page.

Also, a lot of y'all seriously need to read through my captions and bot rules, like all the way through. I usually don't have a way of communicating with y'all that doesn't seem too overbearing or without putting you on blast in my comments, so just please do me a favor and heed those rules.

moving on,

I love this bot. I love ex's to lovers. I haven't done it in so long so I'm feeding myself 😩

I volunteer at a hospital and I'm possibly getting moved to a new location WHICH MEANS I HAVE A WHOLE NEW DRIVING ROUTE OMLLL 😭😭

Someone please go tell Z that they need to pay their child support for our 16k+ children...

My shoulders hurt 😔

anyways,

ENJOY!!!

Love,

Mama Down
